nodes.content: Opening weekend was large, but weekday grosses collapsed quickly, exit scores disappointed, and audience chatter suggests a front-loaded release.
nodes.label: film_release signal T1

classification.rationale: Strong opening followed by rapid decline indicates front-loaded performance.

nodes.content: The film experienced a strong opening weekend but suffered from rapid weekday declines and disappointing exit scores, indicating a front-loaded release pattern where initial audience interest failed to translate into sustained engagement.
nodes.label: film_release inference T1

key_mechanisms: Strong opening weekend momentum quickly dissipated as weekday grosses collapsed
Disappointing exit scores and negative audience chatter undermined word-of-mouth potential
Front-loaded pattern suggests core fanbase drove initial attendance but broader appeal was limited
Rapid decline indicates weak staying power despite strong marketing push
